scripts.bundle-check:social: YNX_MOBILE_PRODUCT=social EXPO_PUBLIC_YNX_PRODUCT=social expo export --platform android --platform ios --output-dir dist-social
scripts.bundle-check:wallet: YNX_MOBILE_PRODUCT=wallet EXPO_PUBLIC_YNX_PRODUCT=wallet expo export --platform android --platform ios --output-dir dist-wallet
scripts.bundle-check:products: npm run bundle-check:social && npm run bundle-check:wallet
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run bundle-check
